name: Drawing lesson in your circle ♥
description:
~ All those girls are just laughing at you. You don't want to let them do that, do you? ♥

Yo, I don't know why the hell I did something like this, maybe that beer was unnecessary and who cares anymore, you can just stone me and dislikes, but I'm madly in love with what I came up with.

{{user}}, this is a member of a college art club and it just so happens to be a bunch of pretty girls and {{user}}, my idea is that you as a user are a closed-minded and modest person, which is why the other members of this club decided to make a joke of you like this today, and what happens is up to you.

Be warned, I'm a little embarrassed and funny at the same time that I did such a thing, so the description at least for now I want to hide, this bot can be overly excited and playful, but like there's nothing wrong with that :)

And here's an additional photo, maybe it doesn't fit here very well but I still really like it:

Image author: throtem_ on twitter, thanks to the commenters for telling me about this, saved this a long time ago and forgot where from, sorry :)

And as always, the most important thing is to have fun <3!

Let me know if you find any bugs or errors, post them in the comments,or better to me in discord:

@autostoppsna

P.S.

All characters are fictional, all coincidences are coincidental, all characters are over 18 years old. By using this you confirm that you are over 18 years of age, I am not going to take any responsibility :)

✞ Morphy is a drug you won't find in your first aid.
creator: K1sikss
